summary.coverage_note: Estimated from test case mapping. TC-045 and TC-046 (perf) skipped — no load runner configured for this frontend-only feature. TC-009/TC-010/TC-011/TC-012 (exact createTask payload shape) have partial coverage: title-contains is asserted but type/assigned/description fields are not verified in dedicated assertions.

typescript.notes: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0. PipelineState.subTaskIds is correctly typed as string[] (required, non-optional).

performance.notes: No load test executed. Sub-task creation is a single POST round-trip; expected < 50 ms on localhost per ADR-1 estimate.

owasp_checks.notes: spaceId sourced from Zustand store (set on login/space-select), not from user-controlled input in the pipeline flow.

Sub-task title is constructed by string interpolation of the main task title. The board already renders task titles; no new XSS vector introduced. TaskCard rendering uses React (auto-escapes). Low risk.
Sequential sub-task creation (not parallel) is architecturally correct per NFR-1.
Pipeline actions are front-end only; all API calls use the same session as the rest of the app.
No serialization/deserialization of untrusted data added.
pipeline_subtask_created events are logged to console at info level as specified in blueprint sec 8.

test_cases.notes: No ? modifier on field definition.

suite_results.failed_test: executeAgentRun > shows 'Opening terminal...' toast and error when terminalSender is null after 500ms wait
suite_results.failure_reason: Test timed out in 5000ms. vi.advanceTimersByTime(500) is insufficient — production polling loop runs for POLL_TIMEOUT=3000ms (30 x 100ms iterations). Test must advance at least 3100ms to exhaust the loop.
suite_results.notes: This test was present before this PR and was presumably passing before. Investigation shows it has a latent miscalibration: the comment says '500ms wait' but executeAgentRun uses POLL_TIMEOUT=3000ms. The test may have passed previously if timer mocking behavior differed, or it is a regression introduced alongside this change. Classified as Medium severity.
